hero.quote: Yogyakarta is not a place you visit — it is a place you return to, even if it is your first time coming.

footer.description: Exploration of Yogyakarta city dimensions through the 2026 interactive digital portal.

editorial.label: Main Report
editorial.description: A multidimensional exploration of Yogyakarta. From the philosophical axis to the technology cluster, every corner of the city is a manuscript waiting to be read.

sejarah.title: 1,200 Years of Narrative
sejarah.desc: From the Canggal Inscription to the modern monarchy, this city's history is the foundation of civilization.

budaya.title: Pulse of Tradition
budaya.desc: UNESCO-recognized crafts, puppetry, and gamelan, coexisting without being crushed by time.

kuliner.title: Symphony of Flavors
kuliner.desc: Local gastronomy recording the traces of patience. From the sweet Gudeg to the extreme Klathak Satay.

wisata.title: Destination Navigation
wisata.desc: Exploring the spatial space from the peak of Merapi in the north to the Parangtritis coast in the south.

teknologi.title: Digital Leap
teknologi.desc: Innovator printing machine. Thousands of STEM graduates per year building the startup ecosystem.

peta.title: Interactive Map
peta.desc: Interactive spatial navigation to map all dimensions of the city in one screen.

ai_guide.ask_guide_desc: Ask about routes, ticket prices, or destination history in real-time.

sejarah.header_desc: Tracing the historical timeline, from the founding of the Yogyakarta Palace to the independence revolution.

budaya.header_desc: Exploring the traces of civilization etched in philosophy, movement, and sound of Yogyakarta.
budaya.aksara_desc: Hanacaraka is a philosophical symbol of the human life journey born in the land of Mataram.

kuliner.header_desc: Explore local gastronomy. Stories of patience behind every dish.

wisata.header_desc: Navigate iconic destinations. Click locations below to explore the map.

teknologi.header_desc: Higher education infrastructure, the Silicon Wali startup ecosystem, and the blueprint for future smart city governance.
teknologi.graduates_desc: The City of Students is not just a nickname. It is the largest printing machine for engineers and tech innovators in Indonesia outside the capital.
teknologi.internet_source: APJII Penetration Index Data for DIY Region
teknologi.business_desc: Growing organically with high capital efficiency.

peta.header_desc: Spatial exploration of all tourism, culinary, tech, historical, and cultural entities in one interactive digital canvas.
